frontmatter.title: LLM-Powered DevOps Assistant for CI/CD Automation

node.html: Built an LLM-based assistant using FastAPI, Groq, and LLaMA 3.3 70B to analyze CI/CD logs and suggest fixes in real time. Automated root cause detection, improving debugging speed and deployment efficiency.

frontmatter.title: Resume Parser with Job Recommendation Engine

node.html: Developed an AI-powered system using Django and BERT to extract skills and match candidates via semantic similarity. Enabled accurate job recommendations beyond keyword matching with an intuitive UI.
